title: ITMS
texts: SRF is a multi business conglomerate in the manufacture of Technical Textiles, Chemicals & Packaging Films. With headquarters in Gurugram, India, the INR 8295 Crore (FY 2021) company with a global workforce of around 7000 & has operations in 4 countries- India, Thailand, South Africa & Hungary. SRF is the market leader in most of its businesses in India and also enjoys global leadership in some of its businesses. With a wide range of products SRF is not only the largest manufacturer of technical textiles in India but also enjoys global leadership in Tyrecord and Belting Fabrics, Coated Fabrics, Laminated Fabrics, Fishnet Twines and Industrial Yarns. The company is equipped with state-of-the-art R&D facilities.

We aspire to achieve global leadership by continuously enhancing organizational and people capability, developing innovative products and processes that satisfy customers and attained challenging benchmarks. SRF remains committed to creating a culture of excellence through people development and employee friendly approaches.
• Packaging Films • Coated and Laminated Fabrics
ITMS is proudly associated with SRF as their authorised distributor for North and West India for Laminated Fabrics and Coated Fabrics.
ITMS (Infinity Trade & Marketing Solutions) Has started operations in 2010 with head office in Delhi and currently has a pan India presence through its own branches and appointed dealers.
ITMS India Pvt. Ltd., ITMS Powertech Pvt. Ltd.,
1002, 10th Floor, Block-C, NDM-2, Netaji Subhash Place, Wazirpur District Centre, Delhi-110034, INDIA
